overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist running through a desert landscape at night toward massive holographic futuristic structures. The scene features prominent cyan and purple neon lighting from projected buildings against a starry night sky with atmospheric haze.

events.description: dialogue appears on screen indicating NPC communication from Morland

agents.ego_description: running steadily through desert terrain toward the glowing holographic structures in the distance

entered.detail: tall tower structure with vertical cyan neon lights extending into the sky
large building with green and yellow neon outline and domed roof
scattered wooden debris and broken structures in the sand
sparse desert bushes and dry grass patches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert wasteland at night with the character running toward distant holographic structures. A tall cyan-lit spire dominates the center horizon while a glowing palace-like building sits to the left. Sparse vegetation and scattered ruins dot the sandy terrain. Dialogue from an NPC named Morland appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert transition zone with palm trees

events.description: second dialogue line appears from Morland about being grounded
ground texture transitions from sand to mixed grass patches

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward through mixed terrain with palm trees appearing on the left

entered.detail: tall palm trees with dark silhouettes against the neon sky
green grass beginning to replace the sandy ground
long wall structure with vertical cyan lighting appearing on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a transition zone where desert sand gives way to grass patches. Palm trees line the left side while a massive holographic wall structure becomes visible on the right. The spire and palace grow larger in the frame as the character approaches. Additional dialogue appears on screen.

events.description: ground surface changes from dirt to grassy terrain with paved stone sections

agents.ego_description: running across grassy terrain with paved pathways, approaching the base of the holographic structures

entered.detail: concrete or stone paved sections embedded in the grass
large rock formations and boulders on the left side

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to grassy ground with paved pathway sections. The character runs between rocky outcrops on the left and the approaching holographic wall on the right. The spire looms much larger now, filling the center of the frame with its intricate cyan light patterns.

events.description: purple neon light glow becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: running along a paved path with the holographic wall on the right and open desert on the left

entered.detail: distant purple and pink neon light beams on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a fully paved path with the massive holographic wall now very close on the right. The spire has shifted to the left side of the frame as the character angles toward the building complex. A purple light glow appears in the distance on the left, adding to the neon color palette.

events.description: character turns to reveal more of the holographic building complex and purple light structures

agents.ego_description: running toward the holographic wall complex while looking around at the surrounding structures

entered.detail: detailed facade of the holographic structure with archways and columns
horizontal purple neon light strips on distant structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the entrance to the holographic building complex. The camera turns to reveal purple neon light beams on the left while the massive cyan-lit wall dominates the right. The ground is fully paved and the starry sky is clearly visible above the structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal desert wasteland that gradually transforms into a lush, structured approach toward towering holographic monuments. It begins with the character running across sandy terrain dotted with ruins, heading toward a distant cyan-lit spire and a glowing palace under a starry sky. As the character advances, the desert sand gives way to patches of grass and palm trees, while a massive holographic wall emerges on the right and the central structures grow larger in the frame. The scene then shifts to grassy ground with paved pathways, guiding the character between rocky outcrops and the looming holographic wall. Finally, the camera closes in on the intricate cyan light patterns of the spire as it expands to dominate the center of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a paved path that draws closer to a massive, neon-lit holographic complex under a starry night sky. It begins with the character running beside a towering cyan wall on the right, while a distant spire shifts toward the left of the frame. As the character angles deeper into the complex, a purple glow emerges in the distance, expanding the neon color palette of the environment. The scene then shifts as the camera turns to reveal vibrant purple light beams on the left, contrasting with the dominant cyan wall that looms on the right. Finally, the movement culminates as the character approaches the entrance to the holographic structures beneath the clear, starlit expanse.
